Sha256Hex.description: Lowercase hex sha256 of the file content.

HistoryEntrySource.description: Origin of this history transition. tool:mcp covers any mcp-app-driven write; specific app id captured in annotation.

version.description: Schema version of this entry. v1 baseline.

sizeBytes.description: File size at the moment of this transition. Used by drift detection cheap-stat comparison.

mtime.description: Filesystem mtime (epoch ms) at the moment of this transition. Used by drift detection.

mime.description: Best-known MIME type. May be null if not yet detected.

sessionId.description: session.id at the moment of transition. null for drift-detected (no driving session).

annotation.description: Free-text. Used to carry mcp tool name (e.g. 'docx_recompose') under source='tool:mcp'.

redirectedTo.description: Only set on source='upload-conflict-rename'. The new filename the upload was redirected to.

HistoryEntry.description: One line of incoming/.history/<filename>.jsonl. Append-only. version field allows forward-compatible schema growth.

repoPath.description: Path relative to session.project.path. Always under incoming/.

historyVersion.description: Number of entries in the file's history jsonl at the time the ref was issued. Lets clients detect mid-flight drift.

status.description: Outcome category of the upload action.

refID.description: Deprecated alias for legacy clients. Mirrors repoPath under a stable identifier. Will be removed after one release.

DispatcherStageRequest.description: Internal contract: what dispatcher passes to mcp tool wrapper after rewriting args.

fromCache.description: true when sha-keyed cache hit; false when computed via mcp

BundleManifest.description: manifest.json inside bundles/<sha>/. docxmcp produces this; opencode reads sha + originStem for traceability.

originStem.description: Filename stem (without extension) that produced this bundle. Hint only; cache key is sha256.
